description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular, boxy structure with a dark wood finish on its main body and a light gray, cushioned top surface. The front side includes a single drawer with a small, round knob and an open lower shelf divided into two compartments, providing both concealed and open storage. The sides are plain, with visible fasteners, and the back is a solid panel. The nightstand sits on small, barely visible feet, giving it a low profile. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no decorative elements or embellishments. Its sturdy construction and neutral color palette make it suitable for modern urban interiors.
description: A modern, dark wood nightstand with a light gray cushioned top, a single drawer with a knob, and an open lower shelf. The design is minimalist and functional, with a sturdy, boxy form.
description_view_0: The front view shows a solid dark wood panel with no visible handles or openings, emphasizing the minimalist design.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, dark wood surface with visible fasteners and the thickness of the cushioned top.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the drawer with a round knob and an open lower shelf divided into two compartments, highlighting the storage features.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain, dark wood panel and the edge of the cushioned top.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
